messages_in.content: What's the typical Young's modulus of mild steel?

final_message: The typical YoungвҖҷs modulus of mild steel is approximately 200 GPa (Gigapascals), or about 29,000,000 psi (pounds per square inch). This value represents the stiffness of the material, describing how much it will deform under a given stress.

The typical YoungвҖҷs modulus of mild steel is approximately 200 GPa (Gigapascals), or about 29,000,000 psi (pounds per square inch). This value represents the stiffness of the material, describing how much it will deform under a given stress.
